## #44457
- added: 2021-06-29 06:51:06

* DE 4 = 1000 amount to be debited from Nathan's ICICI Card\n* DE 3 = 00 transaction type code\n* DE 48 TCC = R, T, U\n* DE 48 SE77 = C07 transaction type identifier P2P / F61 (Wallet load)\n* DE 18 = 6540, 4829, 6538\n* DE 43 = merchant \\* payer\n* DE 108 = Sender details \\[ optional for funding but needed for 4829 & 6540 for sender's data.\\]\n\nR = Face-to-face retail (applicable to MCCs\n\n6538 and 6540)\n\nT = Non-face-to-face retail (applicable to\n\nMCCs 6538 and 6540)\n\nU = Unique Transaction—Quasi Cash\n\nDisbursement (applicable to MCC 4829\n\n\\\n

---
